content:
When Apple introduced MagSafe, the immediate focus then and now has always been on wireless charging. Over the years, I have realized that some of the best aspects of the MagSafe ecosystem are not actually the charging aspect, but also the mounting capabilities. The ability to just snap your iPhone onto a magnetic surface and trust it to hold has opened up a whole new category of accessories. A perfect example of this is the Scosche MagicMount Flask. It takes an everyday item you already carry to the gym or the park and turns it into a highly functional iPhone mount.

MagSafe Monday: Every Monday, Bradley Chambers looks at the latest and greatest in the MagSafe and wireless charging industry to help you get the most out of your Apple devices that support wireless charging.

A built-in tripod for the gym

The standout feature of this water bottle is the lid. It features a counterbalanced hinge with a 360-degree rotating mount head. It uses incredibly strong neodymium magnets. If you are at the gym trying to follow along with workout videos, this water bottle solves that problem completely. You just snap your iPhone onto the lid, adjust the viewing angle, and you have a perfect view of your screen while you exercise. It works in both portrait and landscape modes.

Performance and the hidden dog bowl

Beyond the MagSafe lid, the MagicMount Flask is a very solid water bottle. It is made of double-wall stainless steel and keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours. The 32-oz size is a nice spot for a workout or a hike. It comes with a leak-proof cap and a quick-flip straw.

One of the most interesting additions is the anti-slip silicone base. It does not just keep the bottle from sliding around on a table. It actually slides off and doubles as a small water bowl for a dog. This makes the flask the perfect size for a trip to the park. You have cold water for yourself, a secure stand for your phone, and a convenient bowl to keep your dog hydrated, all in one bottle.

Wrap up on the MagicMount Flask

The Scosche MagicMount Flask is a prime example of why MagSafe is a versatile technology. It takes a product you are already carrying and adds a high level of utility without it feeling like a gimmick. It is a premium insulated flask that happens to be the best portable tripod you will ever own. Whether you are following a workout routine, filming yourself in the gym (I am way too old for that), or just want a better way to hold your phone outdoors, this is a great addition to your setup.

You can grab the Scosche MagicMount Flask on Amazon or directly from Scosche.
